upgrades.change: frontend directory now resolves volk imported targets locally
qualify melonDS::GPU and melonDS::GPU3D type references hidden by Renderer3D member names; preserve frontend-local volk resolution
synchronize all pinned GPU3D Vulkan shader assets, including VertexData.h and FragmentData.h generated headers; verify quoted shader-header include closure
adapt the pinned Vulkan renderer to the target core GPU and Texcache APIs: GPU-owned CaptureCnt/ScreenSwap, target Texcache constructor/update/GetTexture signatures, and loader accessor
restore Vulkan Memory Allocator package visibility on the core target, including the imported include path and dynamic Vulkan function compile definitions
finish V0 frontend cleanup by pruning stale legacy Vulkan bootstrap includes, CLI parsers and main dispatch blocks while retaining the reference runtime probe and renderer-shell tests
replace the removed Phase 12 settings bootstrap with a header-only Vulkan settings UI compatibility facade and scan the full frontend for deleted bootstrap includes
recursively replace relative-path Phase 12 settings bootstrap includes with the header-only Vulkan UI compatibility facade and enforce API/include closure across the full frontend
